response.justification: Exceeds the 15-year experience requirement and currently works on AI-agent infrastructure at a relevant organization, but lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise the role requires. The resume shows broad software engineering excellence across multiple domains rather than demonstrated specialization in AI-powered product development or strategic vision for AI adoption.
strengths: 18+ years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems and infrastructure—exceeds minimum requirement
Currently at staff level working on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure, showing recent engagement with AI tooling and platforms
Proven ability to ship products and lead infrastructure projects across multiple stacks and domains
concerns: No evidence of deep AI/ML expertise, shipped AI-powered products, or recognized thought leadership in AI—critical gap for a principal AI strategy role
Missing preferred Master's or PhD in AI-related field; for a director-level strategic position, this academic gap is significant
Resume demonstrates generalist excellence rather than specialized AI expertise; no evidence of strategic vision-setting or major AI innovation leadership
